settings.heading: Remote Business Partner membership for practical business access and support
settings.text: Membership brings together business platform access, partner pathways, resources, support and plan options for business owners who want ongoing help rather than a one-off transaction.

settings.heading: What membership helps with
settings.text: Use this page to explain the member value proposition clearly before users compare plans or ask for support.

settings.title: Business support access
settings.text: A clearer place to connect services, resources, offers and support pathways.

settings.title: Practical resource pathways
settings.text: Use Essentials, templates and toolkits to support repeatable business work.

settings.title: Partner and marketplace pathways
settings.text: Access relevant partner offers and business opportunities where configured.

settings.title: Help choosing the next step
settings.text: Use support and advisory paths when the right product, service or plan is unclear.

settings.heading: From membership interest to the right plan
settings.text: Membership should make it clear whether a user can join now, compare options or contact support before choosing.

settings.title: Review the membership value
settings.text: Start with what membership includes and who it is designed for.

settings.title: Compare plan options
settings.text: Use the membership options page to review the available plan or offer pathway.

settings.title: Complete signup or enquiry
settings.text: Follow the next step shown on the plan page or contact support if the fit is unclear.

settings.title: Use member pathways
settings.text: Access resources, services, offers and support as the business need changes.

settings.heading: Membership questions
settings.text: Clarify value, options and next steps before users choose a plan.

settings.question: Who is membership for?
settings.answer: Membership is for business owners and operators who want ongoing access to practical business pathways, resources, offers and support rather than a single isolated purchase.

settings.question: Do I join immediately or compare options first?
settings.answer: Use the Membership page as the overview, then compare available plans or offers on the membership options page before joining or enquiring.

settings.question: How does membership connect to support?
settings.answer: Membership can help route you to resources, services, partner pathways and support when your business need changes.

settings.heading: Compare membership options
settings.text: Use the membership options page to review the available plan pathway and next step.
